title: glyceria distans var. gussonei
intro: Glyceria distans var. gussonei, also known as Italian bent or slender mannagrass, is a type of grass native to Europe and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing the risk of kidney stones, treating urinary tract infections, and alleviating symptoms of gout and rheumatism. Glyceria distans var. gussonei can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
